narrative.description: Mario has captured Donkey Kong and caged him at the top of a jungle screen. Donkey Kong Jr. must climb vines, chains, and platforms while avoiding Snapjaws and Nitpickers to collect keys and free his father across four distinct stages.
narrative.core_loop: Climb vertically through single-screen stages, grab keys one at a time and carry them to the cage, avoid or outmaneuver enemies on vines and platforms, and reach the top to unlock the next key until Donkey Kong is freed.

mechanics.map_notes: Jr. climbs and descends vines and chains at variable speed; core traversal mechanic across all stages.
mechanics.expression: Jr. climbs and descends vines and chains at variable speed; core traversal mechanic across all stages.

mechanics.map_notes: Four keys must be collected sequentially and delivered to Donkey Kong's cage to advance.
mechanics.expression: Four keys must be collected sequentially and delivered to Donkey Kong's cage to advance.

mechanics.map_notes: Snappy arcade movement on platforms with no momentum; precise jumps between chains.
mechanics.expression: Snappy arcade movement on platforms with no momentum; precise jumps between chains.

mechanics.map_notes: Contact with enemies or hazards costs a life; no health bar.
mechanics.expression: Contact with enemies or hazards costs a life; no health bar.

mechanics.map_notes: Falling coconuts, electric sparks, birds, and crumbling platforms.
mechanics.expression: Falling coconuts, electric sparks, birds, and crumbling platforms.

mechanics.map_notes: Three lives per credit; restart stage on death.
mechanics.expression: Three lives per credit; restart stage on death.

mechanics.map_notes: Mario patrols the top platform with predictable movement; Snapjaws follow set paths.
mechanics.expression: Mario patrols the top platform with predictable movement; Snapjaws follow set paths.

mechanics.map_notes: Birds swoop on timers; spark gaps open and close rhythmically.
mechanics.expression: Birds swoop on timers; spark gaps open and close rhythmically.

mechanics.map_notes: Each of four stages introduces new enemy types and layout challenges.
mechanics.expression: Each of four stages introduces new enemy types and layout challenges.

mechanics.map_notes: Short hops between vines and platforms require precise timing.
mechanics.expression: Short hops between vines and platforms require precise timing.

mechanics.map_notes: Fruit bonuses award extra points when collected during key runs.
mechanics.expression: Fruit bonuses award extra points when collected during key runs.

mechanics.map_notes: All four keys in a stage must be delivered before the next stage unlocks.
mechanics.expression: All four keys in a stage must be delivered before the next stage unlocks.

mechanics.map_notes: Keys unlock cage segments; color-coded vines toggle between climbable states.
mechanics.expression: Keys unlock cage segments; color-coded vines toggle between climbable states.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Donkey Kong Jr. through its core platformer loop.
